flashcards.definition: Formation of sperm from spermatogonia through meiosis; occurs in seminiferous tubules (~74 days).
Interstitial cells that produce testosterone in response to LH.
'Nurse cells' in seminiferous tubules; support, nourish, and protect developing sperm; form blood-testis barrier.
Primary male sex hormone; produced by Leydig cells; drives secondary sex characteristics, spermatogenesis, and libido.
Muscular duct that transports sperm from the epididymis to the ejaculatory duct.
